song.title: Fill My Cup Lord
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Like the woman at the well I was seeking For things that could not satisfy; And then I heard my Savior speaking: “Draw from My well That never shall run dry.”
[C] Chorus Fill my cup, Lord, I lift it up, Lord! Come and quench This thirsting of my soul; Bread of heaven, Feed me ’til I want no more— Fill my cup, fill it up and make me whole!
[V2] 2) There are millions in this world Who are craving The pleasure earthly things afford; But none can match the wondrous treasure That I find in Jesus Christ my Lord.
[V3] 3) So, my brother, if the things This world gave you Leave hungers that won’t pass away, My blessed Lord will come and save you, If you kneel to Him and humbly pray:
song.author: Richard E. Blanchard
